title: Manual counting will make elections costlier in Latvia
summary_full: Counting votes manually could slightly increase the cost of the 15th Saeima elections in October this year, Māris Zviedris, chairman of the Central Election Commission (CVK), said in interviews with Latvian Television and Latvian Radio on Tuesday morning.
